limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures specifically attributed to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4 due to absence of quantified AI-attributable spend.

AI risk disclosures name specific risk categories (malicious AI use, competitive integration failure, supply chain disruption via AI misuse) but do not provide quantified risk scenarios or named governance bodies, capping risk depth at 3.
Promotional language present for artAI product launch; concreteness scored 4 (deployed with operating detail) rather than 5 as no quantified business results (%, $, volume) are provided.
